description_long: This is a modern, rectangular couch with a wooden frame and dark blue fabric upholstery. The seat is wide and deep, featuring a tufted cushion that spans the entire seating area. Five loose, overstuffed pillows are arranged along the backrest, providing both comfort and a casual aesthetic. The armrests are straight and made of the same wood as the frame, extending the full depth of the couch. The legs are black, metal sled bases that elevate the couch slightly off the ground. The overall design is minimalist yet inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern wooden-framed couch with dark blue tufted upholstery, loose pillows, and black metal sled legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the couch, five loose pillows, and the tufted seat cushion.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden armrest, depth of the seat, and arrangement of pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the tops of the pillows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest, seat depth, and pillow arrangement from the other end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, tufted seat cushion spans the base; five loose, overstuffed back pillows are arranged along the backrest, with no visible attached or integrated cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid dark blue fabric with visible tufting on the seat cushion, giving a subtle textured appearance.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed black metal sled legs, rectangular in shape, providing a modern and sturdy base with moderate height.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, full-length wooden armrests matching the frame, flat-topped and at seat height, with a minimalist rectangular profile.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous wooden backrest with loose, overstuffed pillows providing the main back support; no attached or divided sections.
